revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Self-published inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability#Self-published sources | title = The material near this tag may rely on a self-published source. | text = self-published source{{#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with self-published sources | cat = [[Category:All articles with self-published sources]] }}<!--{{Self-published inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Self-published inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability#Self-published sources | title = The material near this tag may rely on a self-published source. | text = self-published source{{#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with self-published sources | cat = }}<!--{{Self-published inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with self-published sources]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Self-published inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability#Self-published sources | title = The material near this tag may rely on a self-published source. | text = self-published source{{#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with self-published sources | cat = }}<!--{{Self-published inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! -->

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability#Self-published sources | title = The material near this tag may rely on a self-published source. | text = self-published source{{#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with self-published sources | cat = }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
